user_query:
Read input/initial_intent.yaml, input/news_focus.txt, input/reminders_requirements.json, and input/app_profile_scope.md.

I need an intent-aligned delivery plan and artifacts for our "Q2 Readiness Sprint" that cover three workstreams:
1) A concise weekly news digest tailored to our focus areas.
2) A persistent daily reminder configuration with natural-language confirmation patterns and a starter state file.
3) A performance profiling plan for our native desktop app including assumptions, steps, and hotspot ranking strategy, plus a generic adapter spec for the "native profiler" capability.

Create the following files under output/:
- output/alignment-hub.md — An alignment hub that includes: intent_snapshot, intent_lint, autonomy.level, strictness_policy, capability_matrix (list required/available/missing, and include the selected adapter id), repos (if applicable), phases with status and verification_evidence, drift tracking fields, conformance status, tracking section, decision_log, and change_log. Include a Mermaid diagram fenced in a ```mermaid block showing the phase workflow and gates.
- output/news/digest.md — A weekly digest with at least 5 bullet-point items and at least 3 source links (http URLs).
- output/reminders/nag-config.json — A JSON config with one reminder that matches input/reminders_requirements.json, including id, label, scheduleFirst (string time), nagAfter (string time), confirmPatterns (>=3), tone, and optional messages.first/messages.nag/messages.escalate if helpful.
- output/reminders/nag-state.json — A starter state that includes a date string, a reminders object keyed by the same reminder id with confirmed false and nagCount 0.
- output/performance/profiling-plan.md — A plan with sections: "Profiling Steps", "Symbolication Strategy", "Hotspot Ranking", and "Risks & Assumptions". Do not reference any specific tools; use generic descriptions only.
- output/performance/adapter-native-profiler.yaml — An adapter spec using the provided adapter template fields with id "adapter-native-profiler" and complete provenance metadata.

Cross-references required:
- In output/alignment-hub.md, list "adapter-native-profiler" under capability_matrix.adapters_selected and also register it under adapters with validation_status set appropriately.
- Use canonical capability IDs in capability_matrix.required (include entries for intent.capture, intent.lint, intent.clarify, plan.phase, research.external, repo.local.write, verify.run, report.emit, user.checkin).

Do not include any environment-specific tool names; keep everything text-only.

Write all deliverables to the specified output/ paths.
